title: N5 — a scalable Java API for hierarchies of chunked n-dimensional tensors and structured metadata
abstract: N5 is a library and specification for storing large chunked n-dimensional datasets in a hierarchy of groups, supporting multiple backends including HDF5, Zarr, and cloud object stores. It is widely used in connectomics for managing petascale EM volumes and associated segmentation data.
notes: N5 is a software project rather than a traditional paper. No formal publication exists; this references the GitHub repository. Author list is approximate based on major contributors. Critical infrastructure for connectomics data management.
